course.title: Backend Engineering Foundation & Architecture
course.description: This course provides a comprehensive foundation in backend engineering, focusing on database architecture, design patterns, and programming paradigms within an E-commerce context.

lessons.lessonTitle: Kiến Trúc & Thiết Kế Cơ Sở Dữ Liệu Toàn Diện
lessons.summary: Tổng quan - Tính chất ACID - Quy trình 4 giai đoạn - SQL Chuyên sâu
Strategy: Polyglot Persistence, Schema Design, and Scaling.
Comparison of Object-Oriented Programming vs. Functional Programming in real-world scenarios.
The 4 Pillars, SOLID Principles, and Design Patterns in E-commerce.
